TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Bob Anderegg sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1937, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 8, Bob Anderegg, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bob Anderegg htagan beh sa Monroe, Wisconsin. sraral mqwas biru beh Monroe High School. Bob Anderegg mzyu' mari maki Michigan hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2008,Bob Anderegg magal Wisconsin Basketball Coaches Association(WBCA) Hall of Fame. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βoβ an*ereɣɣ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βoβ an*ereɣɣ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βoβ an*ereɣɣ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa monroe, wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin. s~ɕraral mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ monroe ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool. βoβ an*ereɣɣ mzjuʔ mari maki miʦ~ʨħiɣan ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoβ an*ereɣɣ maɣal wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin βas~ɕketβall ʦ~ʨoaʦ~ʨħes~ɕ as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation(wβʦ~ʨa) ħall o* *ame. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Bob Anderegg sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1937, ryax sa tay 24 nqu tay 8, Bob Anderegg, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Bob Anderegg htagan beh sa Monroe, Wisconsin. sraral mqwas biru beh Monroe High School. Bob Anderegg mzyu' mari maki Michigan hopa pqwasan biru. kawas tay 2008,Bob Anderegg magal Wisconsin Basketball Coaches Association(WBCA) Hall of Fame. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: βoβ an*ereɣɣ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, βoβ an*ereɣɣ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan nja βoβ an*ereɣɣ ħtaɣan βeħ s~ɕa monroe, wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin. s~ɕraral mqwas~ɕ βiru βeħ monroe ħiɣħ s~ɕʦ~ʨħool. βoβ an*ereɣɣ mzjuʔ mari maki miʦ~ʨħiɣan ħopa pqwas~ɕan βiru. kawas~ɕ taj ****,βoβ an*ereɣɣ maɣal wis~ɕʦ~ʨons~ɕin βas~ɕketβall ʦ~ʨoaʦ~ʨħes~ɕ as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation(wβʦ~ʨa) ħall o* *ame. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
